mechanics.excerpt: This especially true of Clan characters, who fol: low special set of Life Path rules; Clan path restrictions appear under the Clan Characters heading in each stage_ Some paths have entry requirements called prerequisites: In most cases the prerequisite is certain affiliation, though some paths require the character t0 have obtained certain trait or not t0 have certain trait in order to enter.
